Document:
# Terror spiders
[color=#999999][italic]"Spiders! Oh, no! I am arachnophobic! "[/italic][/color]
Terror spiders are capture antagonists that kill all humanoids that they see.
## Initial spider (Princess of terror) You are princess [color=#fc6cff]TIER 3[/color] spider.
### Abilities
You can open powered doors, spin a web and breach welded vents.
### Extending your population
You have [color=#ace9ff]Lay the egg[/color] action which allows you to spawn [color=#fc6cff]TIER 1[/color] eggs with spiders. eggs will hatch into spiderlings after a 90 seconds and then spiderlings will grow into [color=#fc6cff]TIER 1[/color] spiders with type which you selected before after another 90 seconds.
# TIER 1 spiders
## Terror red
It's combat spider. It has [color=#ace9ff]Strong[/color] web, bigger health and damage.
Also can open [color=#ace9ff]powered doors[/color].
Can evolve into [color=#fc6cff]TIER 2[/color] purple terror after spinning 36 webs.
## Terror green
It's support spider. It can [color=#ace9ff]lay[/color] eggs into humanoids, so with time eggs will hatch into spiderlings inside humanoid's body.
Also has [color=#4d7954]Slime[/color] web which slows humanoids speeds to 30% of their original speed(instead of default 50%).
Can evolve into [color=#fc6cff]TIER 2[/color] white terror after injecting 4 eggs into humanoids.
## Terror gray
It's a stealth spider. It has [color=#ace9ff]Invisibility[/color] ability which makes it invisible at any web.
Also has [color=#665a4f]Stealth[/color] web which more harder to see.
Can evolve into [color=#fc6cff]TIER 2[/color] black terror after spinning 36 webs.
# TIER 2 spiders
## Terror purple
It's an advanced combat spider. In contrast to the red terror it has [color=#a3f2fe]EMP scream[/color] ability which can drain energy from energy devices.
Can evolve into [color=#fc6cff]TIER 3[/color] prince of terror after spinning 36 webs.
## Terror white
It's an advanced support spider. In contrast to the green terror it has acid spit long-distance attack.
Can evolve into [color=#fc6cff]TIER 3[/color] princess of terror after injecting 6 eggs into humanoids.
## Terror black
It's an advanced stealth spider. In contrast to the gray terror it has Jump ability which allows it to jump, jumping also knocks off humanoids.
Also has [color=#4d643e]Poison[/color] web which injects toxin to humanoids standing in it.
Can evolve into [color=#fc6cff]TIER 3[/color] mother of terror after spinning 36 webs.
# TIER 3 spiders
## Prince of terror
It's an even more advanced combat spider. It inherits all the properties of terror purple, but has more health and deals more damage.
## Mother of terror
It's an even more advanced support spider. It inherits all the properties of terror black, and can spawn royal jelly, which heals fellow spiders.
Also has [color=#4d643e]Poison[/color] web which injects toxin to humanoids standing in it.
